reason: Verified agent messaging and response functionality for agent QA-20260429-171248-zchf
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing agent list in sidebar with three agents visible
Located and clicked agent "QA-20260429-171248-zchf" in the sidebar — Agent page opened, displaying agent name at top and showing agent status as "idle"
Verified agent status shows "idle" — Confirmed status indicator in top right corner displays "idle" status (idle icon visible)
Clicked message input box and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message successfully entered in input field
Clicked Send button to submit message — Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", activity indicator appeared showing "Working..."
Waited for agent response — Response received within 1 second (well within 3-minute timeout limit)
Verified response content contains "4" — Response successfully displayed showing "4" as the agent's answer to the math question "What is 2+2?", with metadata showing "Worked for 1s"

Captured final screenshot showing complete conversation — Screenshot confirms user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" on right side and agent response "4" on left side with session name "Quick Math Question Session" visible in breadcrumb and sidebar
